command:
python -u -c 
import urllib.request, ssl, os, json

# Check Zenodo and CORE for this paper
ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
headers = {'User-Agent': 'research-bot/1.0 mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk'}

# Zenodo search
url = 'https://zenodo.org/api/records?q=sethuramanujam+acetylcholine+GABA+direction+coding+retina&sort=mostrecent'
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=15) as resp:
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        hits = data.get('hits', {}).get('hits', [])
        print(f'Zenodo hits: {len(hits)}')
        for h in hits[:3]:
            print(h.get('metadata', {}).get('title', 'no title'))
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Zenodo error: {e}')

# Check crossref TDM links
url2 = 'https://api.crossref.org/works/10.1016/j.neuron.2016.04.041?mailto=a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk'
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url2, headers=headers)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=15) as resp:
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        msg = data.get('message', {})
        links = msg.get('link', [])
        print(f'CrossRef links: {len(links)}')
        for l in links:
            print(l)
        relation = msg.get('relation', {})
        print(f'Relations: {relation}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'CrossRef error: {e}')
